title: HINA Dispatch — Hawaiʻi Local Date + Daily Idempotency

hst_date.detail: today = now_hst().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') where now_hst() returns datetime.now(timezone(timedelta(hours=-10))). Test confirms utcoffset == -36000 seconds. The date used for offering_date is Hawaiʻi Standard Time, not UTC.

daily_idempotency.detail: Before calling _emit_hina, the dispatch block reads the workboard log via _read_workboard_log() and scans for any existing entry where lane='creative', job.action='hina-balance', and payload.offering_date == today. If found, emit is skipped with a console message. Reruns on the same HST calendar day produce zero additional creative jobs.

primary_node_evidence.detail: selection_evidence dict is built before the idempotency check and logged on every successful emit: {offering_date, primary_node, primary_akua, primary_hewa_evidence, total_hewa_nodes, selection_reason, today_overlap_present, timezone}. Evidence appears in stdout for log capture.

no_duplicate_on_rerun.detail: test_hina_idempotency_skips_duplicate_for_same_date patches _read_workboard_log to return a pre-existing entry and asserts emitted==0. test_hina_emits_when_no_existing_log_entry returns empty log and asserts emitted==1.

deferred.sage_citizen_accounts: DEFERRED — out of v1 scope per requirement 7. Sage game, citizen accounts, and automated Studio releases are feature-flagged / deferred.
deferred.automated_studio_releases: DEFERRED — Studio releases require owner approval (output lane gate). No automated public posting.

rollback.instructions: Remove the _read_workboard_log import and the idempotency check block (lines between 'already_dispatched = False' and the _emit_hina call). The original emit-always behavior is restored. No data migration needed — workboard log is append-only.

notes: Live dispatch evidence requires sage_bridge.main() to run on king-server with real parity_check.json hewa data and moon_calendar available. That is a pending owner action (see DISPATCH_LOG.md E — publish_watch launcher).
